product_overview: Ambrand Studio is a professional agency website that showcases branding services, portfolio work, team credibility, and contact pathways. It also includes authenticated admin capabilities for managing projects and client bookings.
core_goals: Present a polished, responsive public-facing studio website
Enable visitors to explore services, portfolio work, testimonials, FAQ, and contact options
Provide authenticated admin tools for project building and booking management
Support lead capture through a validated contact form
Deliver smooth navigation and interactive content browsing across devices

features.name: Public Landing Page Navigation
features.description: Allow visitors to move through the single-page marketing site and access key sections such as services, portfolio, about, testimonials, FAQ, and contact.
user_flows: GET / with no authentication -> Receive 200 and render the landing page -> Click internal navigation link to a section anchor -> Browser scrolls to the selected section
GET / with no authentication -> Receive 200 and render the landing page -> Attempt to access a missing or invalid section anchor -> Browser remains on page and no content change occurs

features.name: Portfolio Gallery and Project Filtering
features.description: Showcase a portfolio of studio projects and allow users to filter work by category.
user_flows: GET /works with no authentication -> Receive 200 and render the portfolio gallery -> Select a valid category filter -> Gallery updates to show only matching projects
GET /works with no authentication -> Receive 200 and render the portfolio gallery -> Select a category with no matching projects -> Gallery shows an empty or no-results state

features.name: Contact Form Submission
features.description: Let visitors submit inquiries through the contact form and send the data to the backend contact endpoint.
user_flows: GET /contact or GET / with no authentication -> Receive 200 and display the contact form -> Submit valid contact details to POST /api/contact -> Receive 200 and show a success confirmation

GET /contact or GET / with no authentication -> Receive 200 and display the contact form -> Submit invalid or incomplete fields to POST /api/contact -> Receive 4xx validation error and display form errors

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Support login and signup using Supabase Auth for access to protected admin features.
user_flows: GET /auth with no authentication -> Receive 200 and display login/signup form -> Submit valid credentials to POST Supabase Auth API -> Receive 200 with authenticated session/token -> Browser can proceed to protected admin access

GET /auth with no authentication -> Receive 200 and display login/signup form -> Submit invalid credentials to POST Supabase Auth API -> Receive 4xx authentication error and display login failure message

features.name: Admin Dashboard Access
features.description: Provide an authenticated dashboard for managing projects and bookings.
user_flows: GET /dashboard with valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 and load the admin dashboard -> Access project and booking tools -> Manage content from the protected interface
GET /dashboard without authentication -> Receive 401 or redirect to /auth -> User is blocked from accessing protected dashboard content

features.name: Project Builder
features.description: Give authenticated admins a drag-and-drop interface for assembling project content blocks.
user_flows: GET /dashboard with valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 and load the dashboard -> Drag blocks from the sidebar to the canvas -> Reorder blocks and edit block properties -> Changes are reflected in the builder state

GET /dashboard with valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 and load the dashboard -> Attempt to use builder features while required dashboard script data is missing -> UI shows an error state or functionality fails gracefully

features.name: Booking Management
features.description: Allow authenticated admins to view client bookings and update booking status.
user_flows: GET /dashboard with valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 and load the dashboard -> Open the bookings section -> View the list of bookings -> Change a booking status and save the update

GET /dashboard with valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 and load the dashboard -> Open the bookings section -> Attempt to update a booking without required permissions or with invalid status data -> Receive an error state and the booking remains unchanged

routes.description: Admin dashboard for projects and bookings

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and signup using Supabase Auth

features.name: Project Builder
features.description: Drag and drop project content builder
user_interactions: Drag blocks from sidebar to canvas

known_limitations.impact: Dashboard fails to load testimonials, potentially causing script errors
/dashboard route tries to serve non-existent admin.html instead of dashboard.html
